synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-25764 Oracle Linux 9 Unbreakable Enterprise kernel bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-25764
description:
[5.15.0-314.193.5.4]
- KVM: arm64: Fix softirq masking in FPSIMD register saving sequence (Will Deacon)  [Orabug: 38513233]
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-25764

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-25764.html
